description: Schema required before a full-fidelity public reference artefact can be used for native solver acceptance.
required_available_case_conditions: status is available
artifact_path exists inside repository
provenance_url is non-empty
redistribution_license is non-empty
sha256 matches artifact bytes
required_observables is non-empty
redistribution_license is an explicit redistributable license identifier accepted by the artifact converter
provenance_url is an HTTP(S) public source URL, not a private file path
all required_observables exist as top-level NPZ keys or JSON observables keys
observable arrays are numeric, finite, non-empty, and satisfy declared minimum rank
observable_contracts declare physical units for each observable
observable_contracts declare the coordinate axes for each observable
observable axes are declared in coordinate_contracts
coordinate_contracts is non-empty
all coordinate_contracts exist as top-level NPZ keys or JSON coordinates keys
coordinate arrays are one-dimensional, numeric, finite, unit-labelled, and satisfy declared length/monotonicity contracts
thresholds is non-empty
thresholds are finite non-negative scalar values
every threshold has an explicit metric, observable, and comparator contract
threshold contract observables are declared in required_observables
threshold contract metrics use supported quantitative metric families
multi-solver nonlinear GK manifests require one GENE, one CGYRO, and one GS2 row with shared benchmark_case_id and deck_physics_sha256
nonlinear GK grid-convergence and production-scaling evidence must cover every required solver family before readiness can pass
nonlinear GK native same-case comparison requires native_output_sha256 before thresholds are evaluated
top-level nonlinear GK NPZ keys are classified by declared coordinate and observable contracts before converted metadata is emitted
